title: Shaping Formula – Stitches & Rows
hero: Enter your starting and ending stitch counts, the number of rows, and your gauge to instantly see how to space your increases or decreases. Works for one or both sides, and shows you exactly which rows to shape on.   Also known as the Magic Formula, this calculator will give you accurate shaping instructions when you are following a pattern and you know your stitches and rows.
description: Enter your stitch counts, rows, and gauge to get instant, row-by-row shaping—on one or both sides. Also known as the Magic Formula, this calculator works when you’re following a pattern and know your stitches and rows.
excerpt: Enter stitch counts and rows to instantly see how to space your shaping.
whyUseThisTool: Get instant shaping instructions for smooth or steep shaping when  you know your stitches and rows.
metaTitle: Magic Formula – Stitches & Rows | Knit by Machine
metaDescription: Turn stitch counts and rows into clear shaping instructions. Calculate your increase or decrease spacing instantly - no spreadsheet required.

schemaMarkup.description: A shaping calculator that turns stitch counts and rows into clear instructions. Enter your starting and ending stitch counts, total rows, and gauge to instantly generate accurate shaping guidance for sleeves, sides, and gradual shaping sections.
